productDisplayName: Puma Women Ess Striped White Tops
description: Composition White and pink striped scoop neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with mega sleeves, blue piping around neckline, cat embroidery on the left chest and behind collar Fitting Comfort Wash Care Gentle machine wash with similar colours in cool water Use light detergent Wash and iron inside out Do not bleach, dry clean or tumble dry Warm iron Add a burst of fresh pink to your wardrobe with this blue and white striped tee from puma. Team this with white cotton pants or shorts and boat shoes for a sailor inspired look. Model's Statistics: 1. The model wears size S in t-shirts 2. Height-5.7', Chest-32", Waist-28"
